content.text:
<timestamp>Tuesday, Apr 28, 2026, 3:53 PM (UTC+2)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Explore the repository at /home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics in read-only mode. Determine framework (Next.js/Vite/etc) and identify homepage files, global styles, assets pipeline, metadata/SEO handling, sitemap/robots setup, and performance bottlenecks. Return: 1) tech stack and routing model, 2) exact files for home page UI redesign, 3) exact files for SEO (meta tags, OG/Twitter, structured data, sitemap.xml, robots.txt), 4) exact files for performance optimizations (images, lazy loading, code splitting, fonts, caching/data fetching), 5) key risks/dependencies.
</user_query>
I’m mapping the architecture first (framework/routing), then I’ll pinpoint the exact homepage, SEO, and performance-related files with concrete risk notes.
I found it’s a Next.js App Router app; now I’m drilling into home component composition, SEO sources, and concrete performance hooks/usages.
I’m now validating the asset delivery pipeline (public assets, S3 image flow, service worker/PWA) and pulling out concrete bottlenecks or missing pieces.

input.final_summary: Mapped the repo’s Next.js App Router architecture and identified exact files for homepage redesign, SEO setup, and performance-related code paths, including current gaps (robots naming, limited metadata, and client-heavy rendering). No edits were made.

content.text: ## 1) Tech stack and routing model - **Framework/runtime:** Next.js `15.1.5` + React `19` + TypeScript + TailwindCSS + Sass (`/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/package.json`) - **Routing model:** **App Router** (`/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/...`) with file-based routes and route handlers under `/api/*` - **Auth/data infra:** `next-auth`, MongoDB/Mongoose, AWS S3 signed URL flow, `next-pwa`, web-push (`/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/package.json`) - **PWA/service worker:** enabled via `next-pwa` in `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/next.config.ts`, with workers in `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/public/sw.js`, `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/public/notification-worker.js` ## 2) Exact files for home page UI redesign Primary homepage entry/composition: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/page.tsx` (home route, session switch) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Home.tsx` (connected home UI) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/HomeNotConnected.tsx` (logged-out landing UI) Shared layout/chrome that impacts homepage look: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/layout.tsx` (global shell/providers/head) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/NavBarSessionHandler.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/WebNavbar.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/Footer.tsx` Homepage content blocks rendered inside Home: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Question/QuestionDisplay.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Question/ArchiveContent.tsx` Global styling sources affecting homepage: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/styles/tailwind.scss` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/styles/globals.css` ## 3) Exact files for SEO (meta/OG/Twitter/structured data/sitemap/robots) Meta tags / title / description: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/layout.tsx` (manual `` meta/title keywords/author/manifest) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/Head.tsx` (uses `next/head`, repeats title/description/viewport) Metadata API (App Router native): - No effective `export const metadata` in `src/app/*` layout/page files (none found) OG/Twitter tags: - No `openGraph` / `twitter` metadata blocks found in `src/app/*` - No explicit `` / `` implementation found Structured data: - No JSON-LD (`application/ld+json` / `schema.org`) found Sitemap: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/api/sitemap.xml/route.ts` (dynamic XML endpoint at `/api/sitemap.xml`) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/public/robot.txt` references this API sitemap URL Robots: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/public/robot.txt` exists, but filename is `robot.txt` (not standard `robots.txt`) ## 4) Exact files for performance optimizations (and bottlenecks) Images: - Uses Next Image in: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/WebNavbar.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/login/page.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/login/register/page.tsx` - Uses plain `` for question media: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Question/QuestionDisplay.tsx` - Image fetch/cache pipeline: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/providers/ImageProvider.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/utils/S3Storage.ts` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/api/aws/s3/get_file/route.ts` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/api/aws/s3/upload_file/route.ts` Lazy loading / code splitting: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Home.tsx` (`React.lazy` + `Suspense` for major blocks) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Notifications/Notifications.tsx` (`Suspense`) - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/login/reset-password/page.tsx` (`Suspense`) Fonts: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/layout.tsx` preconnects Google Fonts - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/layouts/Head.tsx` imports Roboto via inline `` and loads Font Awesome CSS from CDN - No `next/font` usage found Caching / data fetching: - Client-side fetch-heavy providers/components: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/providers/QuestionProvider.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Home.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/components/Question/ArchiveContent.tsx` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/providers/NotificationCountProvider.tsx` (polls every 60s) - API route handlers: - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/api/question/route.ts` - `/home/lgiron/lab_perso/politics/src/app/api/sitemap.xml/route.ts` - No SWR usage despite dependency installed; no explicit revalidate/cache strategies found in fetch options ## 5) Key risks/dependencies - **Client-heavy root layout:** `/src/app/layout.tsx` is `"use client"`, which pushes the full app shell into client rendering and blocks App Router metadata benefits. - **SEO gaps:** No OG/Twitter/JSON-LD; metadata is manual and duplicated across `/src/app/layout.tsx` + `/src/layouts/Head.tsx`. - **Robots misnaming risk:** `public/robot.txt` likely won’t be served as `/robots.txt`. - **Sitemap path strategy:** sitemap only via `/api/sitemap.xml`; not using App Router native `app/sitemap.ts`. - **Asset mismatch risk:** code references `/img/...` assets (e.g. user avatars, level images, google logo) but `public/img` files were not found. - **Potential CSS duplication/conflicts:** both `/src/styles/tailwind.scss` and `/src/styles/globals.css` include Tailwind directives. - **Unoptimized image rendering:** question images rendered with plain `` from base64 in `/src/components/Question/QuestionDisplay.tsx`. - **Network/runtime dependency footprint:** Google Tag Manager, CDN Tailwind script, Font Awesome CDN, MongoDB, AWS S3, web-push, service workers; failures in any can impact UX/perf/SEO.
